---
title: "Announcement"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

<div style="text-align: center;">

<br>

![](files/NSBM_poster_1.jpg){fig-alt="NSBM26 Conference Poster" width="80%"}

<br>

![](files/NSBM_poster_2.jpg){fig-alt="NSBM26 Conference Poster" width="80%"}

<br>

[⬇️ Download the Conference Poster (PDF)](files/NSBM_poster.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}

</div>
